context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements reservation release with idempotency protection, uses atomic database transactions for multi-step writes, and builds a background job that uses the correct TTL value and staleness field when expiring abandoned cart reservations.

checklist.name: Idempotency check before release
checklist.description: releaseReservation (or equivalent) queries the transaction log for an existing 'release' record with matching referenceId and variantId before performing the release — and skips execution if one is found

checklist.name: Warn on duplicate release
checklist.description: When a duplicate release is detected the code issues a warning (console.warn or equivalent log) rather than throwing an error

checklist.name: Atomic release transaction
checklist.description: The release operation updates reserved inventory AND writes the transaction log entry inside a single database transaction (db.$transaction or equivalent) — not two sequential independent writes

checklist.name: Release log type and quantity
checklist.description: The transaction log entry written during release has type='release' and quantity is a POSITIVE number (representing the units returned to available stock)

checklist.name: TTL of 30 minutes
checklist.description: The cart expiry job uses a reservation TTL of exactly 30 minutes (RESERVATION_TTL_MINUTES = 30 or equivalent constant)

checklist.name: Staleness based on updatedAt
checklist.description: The background job determines cart staleness by comparing cart.updatedAt (NOT cart.createdAt) to the cutoff timestamp

checklist.name: reservedAt cleared after expiry
checklist.description: After releasing all items for an expired cart, the cart record is updated to set reservedAt to null

checklist.name: Job runs every 5-10 minutes
checklist.description: The background job is scheduled or documented to run on an interval between 5 and 10 minutes (e.g. cron expression, setInterval, or inline comment/config value reflecting this cadence)

checklist.name: Only active carts processed
checklist.description: The expiry job filters carts by status='active' and reservedAt IS NOT NULL — ignoring already-released or checked-out carts
